zh.lifeSummary: 當Cradoc ap Evan於大約1280年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾時，他的父親Cradoc ap Ynyr42歲，母親Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr38歲。他於1830年6月19日與Elizabeth Lewis在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根育斯特拉萊斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cradoc ap Evan于大约1280年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾时，他的父亲Cradoc ap Ynyr42岁，母亲Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr38岁。他于1830年6月19日与Elizabeth Lewis在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根育斯特拉萊斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Evan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

variants.name: Bevan
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Iefan ‘son of Evan’, with fused patronymic marker (a)p. Compare Evan and Evans .

variants.name: Heaven
meanings: Irish (Tipperary): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEimhín ‘descendant of Eimhín’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of éimh ‘swift’, ‘prompt, ready’.

variants.name: Haven
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) harbor’, from Middle English haven (Old English hæfen ‘haven’).
Dutch: variant of Haveman , or possibly a topographic name from haven ‘port, harbour’. See also De Haven .

variants.name: Evans
meanings: Welsh: derivative of Evan , from Efan, Ifan, medieval forms of Ieuan (from Latin Johannes, the source of English John), dating from c. 1500, with the post-medieval patronymic suffix -s. Welsh Sion was a separate borrowing of English John, and Evan (Ieuan) and Sion developed as independent names.

nameMeanings.name: Cradoc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Respelling of Caradog, an ancient Celtic name apparently derived from the root cār ‘love’. This name was borne by a British chieftain of the 1st century ad in the Latinized form Caractacus, son of Cunobelinos.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Cradoc ap Evan was born about 1280, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Cradoc ap Ynyr, was 42 and his mother, Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr, was 38. He married Elizabeth Lewis on 19 June 1830, in Ystradgynlais, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cradoc ap Evan est né environ 1280, à Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Cradoc ap Ynyr, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lewis le 19 juin 1830, à Ystradgynlais, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cradoc ap Evan um 1280 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cradoc ap Ynyr 42 und seine Mutter Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr 38. Er hat am 19. Juni 1830 in Ystradgynlais, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Elizabeth Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cradoc ap Evan è nato il circa 1280 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Cradoc ap Ynyr, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lewis il 19 giugno 1830, nel Ystradgynlais, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Cradoc ap Evan(이)가 대략 1280년 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cradoc ap Ynyr(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1830년 6월 19일 영국 웨일스 글램르건 이스트라지이레이에서 Elizabeth Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cradoc ap Evan родился около 1280 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cradoc ap Ynyr было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lewis 19 июня 1830 г. в местности истраджинлеи, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cradoc ap Evan nació aproximadamente 1280, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Cradoc ap Ynyr, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mrs. Cradoc ap Ynyr, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Lewis el 19 de junio de 1830, en Ystradgynlais, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas.
